app.name: Liana
advanced.archiveBody: Archiving hides this policy from the home screen. Your coins are not affected and you can restore it any time.
advanced.descriptorBody: The full policy that defines this wallet. Read-only. Save it to recreate the wallet in Liana.
advanced.title: Advanced
archive.title: Archived policies
deleteConfirm.body: This removes "{0}" from this Passport for good. Your coins are not affected, but you will need the descriptor to re-import it.
deleteConfirm.heading: Delete permanently?
deleteConfirm.title: Delete policy
descriptorQr.body: Scan to import this wallet's descriptor elsewhere. It contains only public keys - never your private keys.
descriptorQr.title: Descriptor QR
error.nothingToImport: No policy is ready to import.
error.seedUnavailable: Passport could not load the app key. Restart and try again.
error.xpubDeriveFailed: Could not derive this Passport's public key.
export.descriptorSavedDetail: Import this descriptor in Liana if you need to recreate the wallet.
export.keySavedDetail: Import this file in Liana as Passport's signer key.
export.transactionSignedDetail: Load the signed PSBT back into Liana to finalize or broadcast.
home.noPoliciesBody: Register a Liana descriptor to sign against it. Passport signs, Liana stays the wallet.
import.errorNoPassportKey: This descriptor does not contain this Passport's key.
importDone.body: {0} is registered. Passport can now sign transactions for it.
importDone.title: Policy added
importPaths.spendIntro: How these coins can be spent
importPaths.title: Spend paths
importReview.body: You're about to register a Liana wallet on this Passport. Passport will be able to sign for it, but it does not hold your coins. On the next screen, check the spend paths and keys match what you set up in Liana.
importReview.title: Review wallet
path.primaryDetailOwned: This Passport can sign and spend anytime.
path.primaryDetailOwnedThreshold: This Passport can sign and spend anytime (needs {0}).
path.recoveryDetail: If the coins aren't moved for {0} blocks (~{1} months), {2}{3} can spend them.
policy.spendIntro: How these coins can be spent
policy.title: Policy
rename.body: Give this wallet a name to tell it apart from your other policies. This is stored only on this Passport.
rename.title: Rename wallet
review.loadingDetail: Checking it against your registered policies.
review.noMatch: This PSBT does not match any registered policy. Signing is blocked.
review.notPolicy: This PSBT does not match the registered policy. Signing is blocked.
review.noKeyOnPath: Passport owns no key on the active spend path. Signing is blocked.
review.pathPrimary: Primary path: owner can spend now
review.recoveryWarning: This PSBT uses a recovery path. Only sign if you intend to spend through the timelocked recovery branch.
review.signedBody: Save it to a file to load back into Liana.
review.signedDetail: PSBT signed. Save it to a file to load back into Liana.
review.title: Signing review
verify.notRegisteredDetail: This address is not derived from any wallet on this Passport. Do not use it.
verify.successDetail: This is {0}'s {1} address #{2}. Safe to use.
verify.title: Verify Address
xpub.intro: Liana is the wallet. This Passport is one of its keys. Share this Passport's public key so Liana can build the wallet around it. Your private keys never leave this device.
xpub.networkHint: Choose the same network you're using in Liana.
xpub.step1: Save this Passport's key to a microSD card or USB drive, then move it to the computer running Liana.
xpub.step2: In Liana, create a wallet and add a key, then choose Import from file and select that file.
xpub.step3: Finish building the policy in Liana, then bring the finished descriptor back here with Import Policy so Passport can sign.
xpub.title: Connect to Liana
xpubSave.body: Save this Passport's public key to a microSD card or USB drive, then load it into Liana.
xpubSave.title: Save key
